"It always wakes up dancing. What a happy little tree!"
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"During frigid nights, these critters use their fluffy tails as a blanket to stay warm."
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"In case of darkness, this little elemental is an infinite source of a soothing blue glow."
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"Created by a high elf apprentice, this broom would be extremely useful if anyone could figure out how to make it stop."
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"Ride with the moon (and this furry, whiskered witch) in the dead of night!"
"Looks like this belonged to someone who made it this far... but didn't make it out."
"How do you spot a hardcore player in a crowd? You don't have to, they'll make sure you know it."
"Unto you is charged the great task of keeping the purity of time. Know that there is only one true timeline, though there are those who would have it otherwise."
"Dwarven heritage, smells of the heat of the Great Forge."
"Serene and natural, reflecting the quiet grace of Darnassus."
"The ingenuity of Gnomeregan's finest inventors is reflected in this tabard."
"The red and black banner of Orgrimmar, symbolic of the Horde's endurance."
"Bearing the mark of those shaping their own fate."
"The crest of Quel'Thalas, a symbol of its ancient glory."
"The lion of Stormwind inspires courage in all who see it"
